name: Mr. Rose: The Secret Spy
original_name: พยัคฆ์ร้ายนายกุหลาบ
overview: This is the story of Krub, a naive bodyguard, and Nam Nueng, a talented police officer, and the chaos that ensues whenever they're together. But amidst the chaos they create, the dangers they survive, and the secrets revealed, could love between these two really grow?

trailers.title: พยัคฆ์ร้ายนายกุหลาบ [Official Trailer]
